name: Nanally
description: Anima support with a nurse-like steadiness—she keeps health bars calm while the rest of the squad stays busy, like the friend who always packed extra potions.

seo.title: Nanally — Support
seo.description: Nanally is an Anima support in Neverness to Everness—reliable healing tone, gentle battlefield care, and a comforting backline for everyday teams.
